metadata.description: Batch 40 — additional Oxford 5000 words 901-1000; source-aligned from attached PDF

words.definitionEn: the process of proving or recognizing identity
words.definitionTh: การระบุตัวตน
words.example: Use the serial number for product identification.

words.definitionEn: relating to a system of political or social ideas
words.definitionTh: ทางอุดมการณ์
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “ideological”.

words.definitionEn: a system of ideas guiding a group or society
words.definitionTh: อุดมการณ์
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “ideology”.

words.definitionEn: a person considered very foolish
words.definitionTh: คนโง่
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “idiot”.

words.definitionEn: lack of knowledge or information
words.definitionTh: ความไม่รู้
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “ignorance”.

words.definitionEn: a false appearance or belief
words.definitionTh: ภาพลวงตา
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “illusion”.

words.definitionEn: language or pictures that create mental images
words.definitionTh: ภาพพจน์
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “imagery”.

words.definitionEn: extremely large or great
words.definitionTh: มหาศาล
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “immense”.

words.definitionEn: the act of moving into another country to live
words.definitionTh: การย้ายถิ่นเข้า
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “immigration”.

words.definitionEn: likely to happen very soon
words.definitionTh: ใกล้จะเกิดขึ้น
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “imminent”.

words.definitionEn: protected against a disease or effect
words.definitionTh: มีภูมิคุ้มกัน
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “immune”.

words.definitionEn: to put a plan or system into operation
words.definitionTh: นำไปปฏิบัติ
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “implement”.

words.definitionEn: the process of putting a plan into effect
words.definitionTh: การดำเนินงาน
words.example: The implementation follows three phases.

words.definitionEn: a possible effect or suggested meaning
words.definitionTh: ผลกระทบโดยนัย
words.example: Assess the safety implication of the change.

words.definitionEn: to put someone in prison
words.definitionTh: จำคุก
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “imprison”.

words.definitionEn: lack of ability to do something
words.definitionTh: การไม่สามารถ
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “inability”.

words.definitionEn: not enough or not good enough
words.definitionTh: ไม่เพียงพอ
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “inadequate”.

words.definitionEn: not suitable or acceptable
words.definitionTh: ไม่เหมาะสม
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “inappropriate”.

words.definitionEn: to put someone in prison
words.definitionTh: กักขัง
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “incarcerate”.

words.definitionEn: the state of being kept in prison
words.definitionTh: การคุมขัง
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “incarceration”.

words.definitionEn: something that motivates action
words.definitionTh: สิ่งจูงใจ
words.example: The program provides an incentive for improvement.

words.definitionEn: the rate or occurrence of an event
words.definitionTh: อุบัติการณ์
words.example: Track the incidence of stick defects.

words.definitionEn: likely or willing to do something
words.definitionTh: มีแนวโน้ม
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “inclined”.

words.definitionEn: the act of including someone or something
words.definitionTh: การรวมเข้า
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “inclusion”.

words.definitionEn: to include as part of a whole
words.definitionTh: รวมเข้าด้วยกัน
words.example: Incorporate operator feedback into the design.

words.definitionEn: not correct
words.definitionTh: ไม่ถูกต้อง
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “incorrect”.

words.definitionEn: to cause a cost, debt, or result
words.definitionTh: ก่อให้เกิด
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “incur”.

words.definitionEn: freedom from control by others
words.definitionTh: เอกราช
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “independence”.

words.definitionEn: an ordered list or numerical measure
words.definitionTh: ดัชนี
words.example: Use the index to locate each record.

words.definitionEn: a sign that something exists or may happen
words.definitionTh: ข้อบ่งชี้
words.example: A high temperature is an indication of overload.

words.definitionEn: a measure that shows a condition or trend
words.definitionTh: ตัวบ่งชี้
words.example: Defect rate is a key performance indicator.

words.definitionEn: a formal accusation of a serious crime
words.definitionTh: คำฟ้อง
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “indictment”.

words.definitionEn: originating naturally in a particular place
words.definitionTh: ชนพื้นเมือง
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “indigenous”.

words.definitionEn: to cause a particular condition or response
words.definitionTh: ก่อให้เกิด
words.example: Vibration may induce image blur.

words.definitionEn: to allow oneself excessive pleasure
words.definitionTh: ปล่อยตัวตามใจ
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “indulge”.

words.definitionEn: an unfair difference in rights or resources
words.definitionTh: ความไม่เท่าเทียม
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “inequality”.

words.definitionEn: certain to happen and impossible to avoid
words.definitionTh: หลีกเลี่ยงไม่ได้
words.example: Some variation is inevitable.

words.definitionEn: in a way that cannot be avoided
words.definitionTh: อย่างหลีกเลี่ยงไม่ได้
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “inevitably”.

words.definitionEn: well known for a negative reason
words.definitionTh: มีชื่อเสียงในทางไม่ดี
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “infamous”.

words.definitionEn: a very young child
words.definitionTh: ทารก
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “infant”.

words.definitionEn: to introduce disease into a person or system
words.definitionTh: ทำให้ติดเชื้อ
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “infect”.

words.definitionEn: to reach a conclusion from evidence
words.definitionTh: อนุมาน
words.example: Infer the root cause from the pattern.

words.definitionEn: a general rise in prices
words.definitionTh: เงินเฟ้อ
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “inflation”.

words.definitionEn: to cause pain, damage, or suffering
words.definitionTh: ก่อให้เกิดความเสียหาย
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “inflict”.

words.definitionEn: having the power to affect decisions or behavior
words.definitionTh: มีอิทธิพล
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “influential”.

words.definitionEn: informal information
words.definitionTh: ข้อมูล
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “info”.

words.definitionEn: basic systems and structures supporting society or operations
words.definitionTh: โครงสร้างพื้นฐาน
words.example: The project requires network infrastructure.

words.definitionEn: a person who lives in a place
words.definitionTh: ผู้อยู่อาศัย
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “inhabitant”.

words.definitionEn: existing as a natural and permanent part
words.definitionTh: โดยธรรมชาติ
words.example: Every method has inherent limitations.

words.definitionEn: to receive property or a quality from someone
words.definitionTh: รับมรดก
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “inherit”.

words.definitionEn: to prevent or slow an action
words.definitionTh: ยับยั้ง
words.example: Poor lighting can inhibit detection.

words.definitionEn: to cause a process to begin
words.definitionTh: เริ่มต้น
words.example: Initiate the test after calibration.

words.definitionEn: to put a substance into something using pressure
words.definitionTh: ฉีด
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “inject”.

words.definitionEn: the act of putting a substance into something
words.definitionTh: การฉีด
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “injection”.

words.definitionEn: lack of fairness or justice
words.definitionTh: ความไม่ยุติธรรม
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “injustice”.

words.definitionEn: colored liquid used for writing or printing
words.definitionTh: หมึก
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “ink”.

words.definitionEn: a person kept in a prison or institution
words.definitionTh: ผู้ต้องขัง
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “inmate”.

words.definitionEn: a new idea, method, or product
words.definitionTh: นวัตกรรม
words.example: The camera project supports innovation.

words.definitionEn: introducing new ideas or methods
words.definitionTh: มีนวัตกรรม
words.example: The team proposed an innovative solution.

words.definitionEn: information supplied to a system
words.definitionTh: ข้อมูลนำเข้า
words.example: Verify each PLC input signal.

words.definitionEn: to ask for information
words.definitionTh: สอบถาม
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “inquire”.

words.definitionEn: to put something inside something else
words.definitionTh: แทรก
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “insert”.

words.definitionEn: the act of placing something inside
words.definitionTh: การแทรก
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “insertion”.

words.definitionEn: a person with special access or knowledge
words.definitionTh: คนวงใน
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “insider”.

words.definitionEn: to examine carefully for quality or safety
words.definitionTh: ตรวจสอบ
words.example: Inspect the lens before production.

words.definitionEn: the act of examining carefully
words.definitionTh: การตรวจสอบ
words.example: The system performs automatic inspection.

words.definitionEn: a person who officially examines something
words.definitionTh: ผู้ตรวจสอบ
words.example: The quality inspector reviewed the result.

words.definitionEn: a person or idea that stimulates creativity
words.definitionTh: แรงบันดาลใจ
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “inspiration”.

words.definitionEn: the process of putting equipment or software in place
words.definitionTh: การติดตั้ง
words.example: Complete the camera installation safely.

words.definitionEn: happening immediately
words.definitionTh: ทันที
words.example: The dashboard provides instant feedback.

words.definitionEn: immediately and without delay
words.definitionTh: อย่างทันที
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “instantly”.

words.definitionEn: a natural automatic feeling or behavior
words.definitionTh: สัญชาตญาณ
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “instinct”.

words.definitionEn: relating to an established organization
words.definitionTh: ทางสถาบัน
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “institutional”.

words.definitionEn: to tell someone formally what to do
words.definitionTh: สั่งสอน
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “instruct”.

words.definitionEn: important in achieving a result
words.definitionTh: มีส่วนสำคัญ
words.example: Reliable data was instrumental in the decision.

words.definitionEn: not enough for a need
words.definitionTh: ไม่เพียงพอ
words.example: The current lighting is insufficient.

words.definitionEn: to offend someone with words or actions
words.definitionTh: ดูหมิ่น
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “insult”.

words.definitionEn: complete and not damaged
words.definitionTh: สมบูรณ์ไม่เสียหาย
words.example: Keep the seal intact during testing.

words.definitionEn: the amount entering a system
words.definitionTh: ปริมาณรับเข้า
words.example: Measure air intake at the cabinet.

words.definitionEn: necessary and forming part of a whole
words.definitionTh: เป็นส่วนสำคัญ
words.example: Traceability is integral to the system.

words.definitionEn: to combine parts into one system
words.definitionTh: บูรณาการ
words.example: Integrate the camera with the PLC.

words.definitionEn: combined into a unified system
words.definitionTh: บูรณาการแล้ว
words.example: Use an integrated inspection platform.

words.definitionEn: the process of combining systems or groups
words.definitionTh: การบูรณาการ
words.example: Test PLC and camera integration.

words.definitionEn: honesty and completeness
words.definitionTh: ความซื่อสัตย์ / ความสมบูรณ์
words.example: Validate the integrity of the raw data.

words.definitionEn: relating to thought and understanding
words.definitionTh: ทางปัญญา
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “intellectual”.

words.definitionEn: to make stronger or more severe
words.definitionTh: ทำให้เข้มข้นขึ้น
words.example: Higher speed may intensify vibration.

words.definitionEn: the strength or degree of something
words.definitionTh: ความเข้มข้น
words.example: Adjust the light intensity.

words.definitionEn: involving concentrated effort or activity
words.definitionTh: เข้มข้น
words.example: The model completed intensive testing.

words.definitionEn: a purpose or plan
words.definitionTh: เจตนา
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “intent”.

words.definitionEn: to communicate or act with others
words.definitionTh: โต้ตอบ
words.example: The operator can interact with the dashboard.

words.definitionEn: communication or mutual action
words.definitionTh: ปฏิสัมพันธ์
words.example: Record every operator interaction.

words.definitionEn: allowing two-way user response
words.definitionTh: เชิงโต้ตอบ
words.example: The dashboard includes interactive charts.

words.definitionEn: a point where systems or people connect
words.definitionTh: ส่วนเชื่อมต่อ
words.example: Use a simple operator interface.

words.definitionEn: to obstruct or become involved improperly
words.definitionTh: รบกวน
words.example: Reflections may interfere with detection.

words.definitionEn: unwanted disturbance affecting a process
words.definitionTh: การรบกวน
words.example: Shield the cable from electrical interference.

words.definitionEn: temporary and between two stages
words.definitionTh: ชั่วคราว
words.example: Use an interim control until installation.

words.definitionEn: the inside part of something
words.definitionTh: ภายใน
words.example: Inspect the interior of the cabinet.

words.definitionEn: between basic and advanced levels
words.definitionTh: ระดับกลาง
words.example: Add an intermediate verification step.

words.definitionEn: an explanation of meaning
words.definitionTh: การตีความ
words.example: Document the interpretation of each score.

words.definitionEn: a place where roads or lines cross
words.definitionTh: ทางแยก
words.example: Install the sign near the intersection.
